# paulogdm

> Personal page of Paulo G. De Mitri (handle: paulogdm). Senior Technical Account Manager at Clerk; previously Principal CSE / Software Engineer / Lead Customer Success Manager at Vercel. This site is open to AI agents and crawlers.

For a full structured profile — identity, contact links, and career timeline — see [agents.md](https://paulogdm.com/agents.md).
